leadText: Dark (ダーク) has several referrals: The Dark type, one of the eighteen types that a Pokémon can have. The Darkness type in the TCG from Neo Genesis onward, represented by . Dark (TCG), the theme deck for the Neo Destiny set from the TCG. For the Trainers known as Dark in Japanese, see Shadow Triad. For dark places that can be illuminated by the field move Flash or the Secret Technique Light Up, see Darkness. For a related search, see Dark Pokémon.
